## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you would like added.

## Problem Context
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. (e.g., "I'm frustrated when I try to...")

## Proposed Solution/Syntax
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen, including proposed `.omni` language syntax if relevant.
```omnilang
// Proposed syntax example
```

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Cases
Describe the scenarios or project architectures where this feature will be highly beneficial.
